chapter_title.en: Chapter 214 – Following up the Hajj with the Ziyarah

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/258)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/258)
text: حَجَجْنَا فَمَرَرْنَا بِأَبِي  عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ حَاجُّ بَيْتِ اللَّهِ وَ زُوَّارُ قَبْرِ نَبِيِّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ شِيعَةُ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ هَنِيئاً لَكُمْ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Asbaat, from Yahya Bin Yasaar who said,

‘We performed Hajj and we passed by Abu Abdullahasws, so heasws said: ‘You have performed Hajj of the House of Allahazwj, and Ziyarah of the grave of the Prophetsaww, and Shiahs of the Progenyasws of Muhammadsaww welcome to you all!’.
en.sarwar: 3. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla’ ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn Asbat from Yahya ibn Yasar who has said the following: “We performed al-Hajj. We then visited abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam. He (the Imam) said, ‘Welcome, visitors of the House of Allah, visitors of the grave of His prophet and followers of the family of Muhammad, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, wholesome and delightful indeed are your visits.’”
